user.title: Add amaran
user.description: Import supported lights from amaran Desktop, or add one light manually.

import.title: Import amaran lights
import.description: Export your Amaran lights from the desktop app, then paste the JSON here. On macOS, run: curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/neyako/amaran-hacs/refs/heads/main/scripts/export_amaran.py | python3 - | pbcopy

import_json.title: Import amaran lights
import_json.description: Export your Amaran lights from the desktop app, then paste the JSON here. This runs locally and reads the Amaran Desktop database. Do not share the exported JSON publicly because it contains your lighting mesh keys. The JSON contains the keys Home Assistant needs plus each light name, model, address, and capabilities.

import_path.title: Import amaran lights from local path
import_path.description: Advanced fallback for users who already mounted or copied amaran.db or JSON into Home Assistant. Source path on macOS to copy from: ~/Library/Application Support/amaran Desktop/*_secure_id/amaran.db. After copying into HA, paste the HA-local path here, for example /config/amaran.db.

select_fixture.title: Select light

manual.title: Add amaran light manually
manual.description: Add one light per config entry. Keys must come from your own export or desktop database.

error.invalid_input: Check the address, optional BLE connection MAC, advanced addresses, sequence, IV index, TTL, and 32-character hex keys.

abort.already_configured: This light and source address are already configured.
abort.bluetooth_discovery_disabled: Bluetooth discovery is disabled. Add lights by importing your Amaran export JSON.

init.title: Advanced connection settings
init.description: Leave blank to use the first reachable known light. Set a known-good BLE MAC to prefer it.

data.enable_presence_checking: Mark unavailable when this light stops advertising
